headline: Fidelity National Unveils Cloud-Native Enterprise Risk Suite on AWS
summary: FIS launches Enterprise Risk Suite on AWS, giving financial firms cloud-native risk tools with continuous updates and scalable computing.

headline: BankSouth Selects FIS® Core Banking Platform to Modernize Operations and Unlock AI Readiness
summary: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., May 20, 2026--FIS® (NYSE: FIS), a global leader in financial technology, today announced that BankSouth, a top-performing community bank in Georgia, has selected FIS to power its retail and business banking businesses.
